name: RPlog_Mandalore_-_Arrival
title: Mandalore: Arrival
summary: The Corellian pilot Paul Nighman, his young companion the disguised bard Shenner, and the Mandalorian warrior Dane Noth touch down on the scarred, war-ravaged world of Mandalore aboard the Hawk's Wing. They are met by the cool, watchful Mandalorian Urio'kosh, who processes them through a retina-scan security clearance and grudgingly grants the offworlders limited access to a small hangar in the military complex. Dane reunites with his kinsmen, exchanging the ritual greeting 'Nava Choi' with the proud young warrior Kairne and arranging to visit his clan's lands while Paul prepares his expedition into the field. As the Mandalorians depart on their own errands, Paul and Shenner are left alone in the quiet hangar, where the weary girl finally lets her businesslike facade slip and the two share a tender, uncertain moment of closeness. Dane returns to check on them, and the arrival sets the stage for the dangerous archaeological venture to come on the forgotten planet.
